package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for cross_layer_import_violation_by_package_name: Imports where package names clearly violate a layered direction such as `repository -> handler` or `model -> gin`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule019NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule019NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule019NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario019Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule019NegativeService, input Rule019NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
